app.title: Product management
f.name: Product name
editor.statusHelp: “Out of stock” and “Unavailable” stay visible but can't be purchased · “Hidden” disappears from the site entirely.
f.descPh: Short description shown on the product card…
editor.imageHelp: Uploaded images are compressed & embedded directly (keeps the file small).
editor.variantHelp: Each plan has a label, price (€) and its own status (available / unavailable / on request / hidden).
preview.title: Store preview
preview.help: Preview using the current data (incl. unsaved changes). Hidden products don't appear here.
settings.title: Settings
gate.loginSub: Enter the admin password to open the interface. The same password works on every device (including phone).
gate.passCallout: The password is stored as a SHA-256 hash inside admin/index.html. The hash is irreversible — even reading the source code won't reveal the password (with a strong password).
setup.title: First-time setup
setup.sub: The file admin/index.html has no password yet. Set your password here — a hash is generated for you to paste into the file.
setup.p1: Set a password (≥ 8 chars, longer is better)
setup.how:
How to apply:
  1. Open admin/index.html in the repo.
  2. Find the line: const ADMIN_PASS_HASH = '__SET_ME__';
  3. Replace '__SET_ME__' with the generated hash (keep the quotes).
  4. Commit & push to GitHub.
  5. Wait for the GitHub Pages build (~1 min), reload this page.
After this, anyone visiting /admin/ must enter the correct password.
conn.title: Connect GitHub
conn.sub: Paste a Personal Access Token so the admin can save changes (commit) to the repo. The token is stored only in this browser.
conn.callout:
Create a safe token (recommended):
  1. Open Fine-grained tokens
  2. Resource owner = repo owner · Repository access = Only select repositories → pick this exact repo
  3. Permissions → Repository → Contents: Read and write
  4. Short expiration (e.g. 30–90 days), create the token and paste it above
t.minPass: Password must be at least 8 characters
t.repoNotFound: Repo not found or token lacks permission
t.noData: Could not read products.json — starting with an empty list
t.deletedList: Removed from the list — remember to click Save
t.conflict: Conflict — reload the page and try again
settings.syncHelp: Stores the token (encrypted with your admin password) in the repo. Other devices restore it automatically after you enter the correct admin password — no need to paste the token again.
t.passNeeded: Enter the admin password to continue:
t.unsynced: Synced token file removed from repo
confirm.unsync: Delete the synced token file from the repo? New devices will have to enter the token manually.
confirm.delete: Delete “{name}”? (applies only when you click Save)
confirm.changePass: Changing the password = a new hash you must paste into admin/index.html and commit. Continue?
confirm.logout: Log out from this device? (clears token + remembered password)
